title: Former Prince Andrew’s Arrest Is Met With Strong Reactions and Apathy in Windsor
author: Megan Specia and Stephen Castle
fullText: “Her children have let her down,” said one woman, referring to Queen Elizabeth II. Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor’s fall from grace drew strong reactions from some. Others said they just did not care.
summary: “Her children have let her down,” said one woman, referring to Queen Elizabeth II. Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor’s fall from grace drew strong reactions from some. Others said they just did not care.
